fields.name: parentId
fields.description: Identifier of the deleted parent the cascade is clearing dependents for.

fields.name: parentEntity
fields.description: Identifies the parent entity of the cascade.

fields.name: rowCount
fields.description: The number of rows deleted by the cascade.

fields.name: headId
fields.description: Scratch: id of the dependent row the loop is currently deleting.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Dependent entity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity holding rows that point at the parent (compose one cascade trait per dependent type). Defaults to the atom's own log so the standalone validates; rebind per composition.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Delete related records too
overridableConfigKeys.description: When a record is deleted, also delete the records that belong to it. Off by default.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: enable, turn on, enforce, require, activate, apply, switch on, cascade delete, delete children, on delete cascade, cascade on delete, remove related, soft delete cascade, dependent deletes, integrity cascade

overridableConfigKeys.label: Foreign-key field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Field on dependent rows that holds the parent's id.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Parent entity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity whose deletion triggers the cascade.
